channel.title: Furniture on SuperList.us
channel.description: Recent content in Furniture on SuperList.us

item.title: Carriage House Furnishings
item.description: Handcrafted hardwood furniture, rockers, hope chests, and rocking horses in a showroom that was once a real carriage restoration shop. Locally made in Lancaster County. The showroom still has historical items from the stagecoach era on display. Located in Intercourse, because of course it is.
